text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Jordan. It's not every day we see you doing
solo training.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know. I guess I'm just in the mood or
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Interesting attitude... But whatever works. Let's
go!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, what a run! The wind felt great!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uhh... What's up, City? Everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know... It's a bit weird having you just staring
at me like that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you notice? You're totally fine, even after
running as hard as we did.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh... No way! You're right! I'm not tired at all!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! What is this, a legit miracle?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that trainer of yours must be doing
something right.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well... That might be it. Trainer can be a bit
intense and annoying, but... I more or less get
what I'm supposed to do.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep that between us, okay? Last thing I
need is my trainer getting a big head.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm thirsty! I'm gonna go get something
to drink!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And she still has energy to run.
